steps.title: Identify the unifying theme
steps.content: Both texts focus on the same problem: the challenge scientists face in understanding sloths. Text 1 explains the obstacle—sloths live high in trees, making them inaccessible and hard to study. Text 2 describes how scientists are responding to this challenge by using monitors to discover sloths' actual behaviors.

steps.title: Match the theme to the answer
steps.content: Choice A directly captures what both texts discuss: scientists' efforts to understand sloths. The other choices either address content unique to one text or focus on specific details rather than the shared central theme. That matches choice A — A is correct.
